caption: A screen recording shows a video conference call and a complex digital mind map on a dark background. In the top corners, a man wearing a dark baseball cap is visible in a small video window. The main screen displays a network of interconnected circular nodes and lines. Several nodes feature illustrated avatars and text labels, such as "Insights," "Invisible," "Invisible," and "Invisible." A larger rectangular image depicts a cartoonish "SALE" sign with shopping carts. As the sequence progresses, the mind map expands, with more nodes and connecting lines appearing across the screen. New labels emerge, including "Invisible," "Invisible," and "Invisible," while more circular avatars are added to the network. The browser tabs at the top are partially visible, with text including "Trust & Learning by Synergetic," "Future of Society by Synergetic," "insights Introduction kumu," and "Road Community Food Spot."
